title: Plan the establishment of sports turf playing surfaces
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan the establishment of sports turf playing surfaces demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Conduct site assessment and develop a performance brief for sports turf playing surface

pcs.text: Liaise with client to determine requirements for establishing sports turf playing surface
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with client to determine requirements for establishing sports turf playing surface?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with client to determine requirements for establishing sports turf playing surface.

pcs.text: Assess site for hydrological, biophysical and chemical characteristics and effect on sports turf establishment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess site for hydrological, biophysical and chemical characteristics and effect on sports turf establishment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess site for hydrological, biophysical and chemical characteristics and effect on sports turf establishment.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish a site survey to locate existing features, levels and services according to workplace and client requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and select turf grass species and cultivars suitable for turf establishment according to client requirements and sport play standards.

pcs.text: Investigate and select turf area construction techniques suitable to client requirements and site characteristics

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and select turf area construction techniques suitable to client requirements and site characteristics.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate legislative and regulatory implications and solutions for proposed works.

pcs.text: Determine environmental impact of proposed works, and recommend actions to minimise impact according to legislative and regulatory requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine environmental impact of proposed works, and recommend actions to minimise impact according to legislative and regulatory requirements.
